questionHtml:
Gundega claims that, on average, Latvian women are taller than Dutch women.

Random samples of 10 Latvian women and 10 Dutch women are chosen, and their heights are measured.

Gundega performs a t-test at the 5 % significance level. It is assumed that the populations are normally distributed and have equal variances.

b.
markschemeHtml:
94.86          A1

 

Note: Follow through from an incorrect part (c)(i) if fourth value is found by subtracting first three values from 200. Award at most A0A1 if both answers are not given to four significant figures.

Award A0A1 for an answer of a=82.2 and b=94.8.

[1 mark]

meta.title: b.
